name: Banana Nut Bread- Pjxg05a
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the margarine and sugar.
2. Add egg yolks (only) and salt to the mixture. Mix well.
3. Gradually add flour and blend until combined.
4. In a separate bowl, combine baking soda with the mashed bananas.
5. Fold in the well-beaten egg whites.
6. Add chopped pecans to the batter.
7. Pour the mixture into 2 small or 1 large greased loaf pans.
8. Bake at 350°F for 30 to 40 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
